vocabulary.example: Their house is very large.
I can't wait to go home.
We watch TV in the living room.
My bedroom is upstairs.
The bathroom is clean.
My mother is cooking in the kitchen.
Dinner is ready in the dining room.
My father works in the study.
There are flowers on the balcony.
The car is in the garage.
I make my bed every morning.
This mattress is very soft and comfortable.
She rested her head on the pillow.
He pulled the blanket over his shoulders.
All her clothes are in the wardrobe.
I do my homework at my desk.
Please sit on this chair.
They sat on the sofa to watch a film.
Put the plates on the table.
The bookshelf is full of novels.
The plates are in the kitchen cabinet.
She keeps her socks in the top drawer.
He looked at himself in the mirror.
I turned on the lamp to read a book.
Please close the curtains at night.
There is a soft carpet in the living room.
Put the books on the shelf, please.
Hang your coat on the hanger.
We bought a new television for the living room.
Keep the milk in the refrigerator.
Heat the soup in the microwave.
She baked a cake in the oven.
I put my dirty clothes in the washing machine.
Load the dirty plates into the dishwasher.
He used the vacuum cleaner to clean the carpet.
Turn on the air conditioner; it's very hot today.
The fan keeps the room cool.
We use a heater to keep warm in winter.
Please close the door behind you.
Open the window to let in fresh air.
There is a painting on the wall.
The floor is wet, so be careful.
The lamp hangs from the ceiling.
She walked up the stairs to her room.
I can't find the key to the front door.
The lock on the door is broken.
The light switch is next to the door.
Plug the charger into the power outlet.
Throw the wrapper in the trash bin.
There is a green plant by the window.
I clean my room every weekend.
They decorate the house for the holidays.
This sofa is very comfortable.
The small room felt warm and cozy.
Their new apartment is bright and spacious.
His desk is always messy.
She keeps her bedroom neat and tidy.
They live in a modern apartment.
The house has a traditional wooden design.
The neighbourhood is very quiet at night.
The bookcase in the corner holds all my novels.
There is a lamp on the nightstand beside my bed.
She keeps her clothes folded in the dresser.
The plates are in the kitchen cupboard.
I put my winter clothes in a storage box.
She put fresh roses in a glass vase.
There is a small flower pot on the windowsill.
He waters the plant pot every morning.
A silver picture frame sat on the desk.
A large painting hangs above the sofa.
She leaned back against a soft cushion.
The bed was covered with colourful throw pillows.
I changed the bedsheet this morning.
In winter I sleep under a warm duvet.
Please wipe your feet on the doormat.
The clock on the wall says it's noon.
A round wall clock hangs in the kitchen.
My alarm clock wakes me at six every day.
I can't find the remote control for the TV.
Someone rang the doorbell during dinner.
There is an umbrella stand near the front door.
Hang your jacket on the coat rack.
We keep our shoes on the shoe rack by the door.
Put your dirty socks in the laundry basket.
The laundry hamper is full of clothes.
There is a tissue box on the coffee table.
He tied up the trash bag and took it outside.
She sprayed some air freshener in the bathroom.
We lit a candle during the power cut.
The shelf is full of old books.
She read a fashion magazine on the sofa.
We looked through the old photo album together.
The blankets are kept in a blanket basket by the sofa.
He built a storage shelf in the garage.
The kids love sitting on the bean bag.
She sat on a wooden stool in the kitchen.
There is a long bench in the hallway.
Grandpa reads the newspaper in his favourite armchair.
Put the cups on the coffee table.
There is a small side table next to the bed.

exerciseSets.title: Điền từ vào chỗ trống
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ vựng phù hợp để hoàn thành câu về nhà cửa, nội thất và thiết bị gia dụng.

exercises.question: Keep the milk cold in the ___.
Heat the soup quickly in the ___.
She baked a cake in the ___.
Put your dirty clothes in the ___ to wash them.
It's very hot; please turn on the ___.
Please close the ___ so no one can come in.
Open the ___ to let in some fresh air.
There is a beautiful painting on the ___.
Be careful, the ___ is wet and slippery.
She walked up the ___ to her bedroom.
I can't find the ___ to open the front door.
He looked at himself in the ___ before going out.
Please close the ___ at night so people can't see in.
There is a soft ___ on the living room floor.
Throw the empty wrapper in the ___.
Press the ___ next to the door to turn on the light.
He used the ___ to clean the dusty carpet.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn nghĩa đúng
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng về nghĩa của từ vựng nhà cửa và nội thất.

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'tủ lạnh'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'rèm cửa'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'máy hút bụi'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'gọn gàng'?
Từ nào trái nghĩa với 'messy' (bừa bộn)?
exercises.explanation: tidy (gọn gàng) trái nghĩa với messy (bừa bộn)

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'lò vi sóng'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'máy sưởi'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'công tắc đèn'?

exerciseSets.title: Viết từ tiếng Anh
exerciseSets.description: Dựa vào nghĩa tiếng Việt, viết từ tiếng Anh tương ứng.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn collocation đúng
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ đi kèm đúng để tạo thành cụm từ tự nhiên về việc nhà.

exercises.question: ___ the housework (làm việc nhà)
exercises.explanation: do the housework = làm việc nhà

exercises.question: ___ on the light (bật đèn)
exercises.explanation: turn on the light = bật đèn

exercises.question: ___ off the light (tắt đèn)
exercises.explanation: turn off the light = tắt đèn

exercises.question: ___ the table (dọn bàn ăn, bày bát đĩa)
exercises.explanation: set the table = dọn/bày bàn ăn

exercises.question: take out the ___ (đổ rác)
exercises.explanation: take out the trash = đổ rác

exercises.question: ___ the curtains (kéo rèm lại)
exercises.explanation: close the curtains = kéo rèm lại

exercises.question: tidy ___ the room (dọn dẹp phòng)
exercises.explanation: tidy up the room = dọn dẹp phòng

exercises.question: ___ the house (dọn dẹp nhà cửa)
exercises.explanation: clean the house = dọn dẹp nhà cửa

exerciseSets.title: Phòng nào & Đồ dùng nào?
exerciseSets.description: Chọn phòng hoặc thiết bị phù hợp với hoạt động được mô tả.

exercises.question: Bạn thường nấu ăn ở phòng nào?
exercises.explanation: kitchen = nhà bếp, nơi nấu ăn

exercises.question: Bạn thường ngủ ở phòng nào?
Bạn tắm rửa ở phòng nào?
Gia đình thường ngồi xem TV ở phòng nào?
Bạn thường để xe ô tô ở đâu?
'refrigerator' thường được đặt ở phòng nào?
exercises.explanation: Tủ lạnh thường đặt ở nhà bếp.

exercises.question: 'wardrobe' (tủ quần áo) thường ở phòng nào?
exercises.explanation: Tủ quần áo thường đặt trong phòng ngủ.

exercises.question: Bạn ăn tối cùng gia đình ở phòng nào?
Bạn ngồi làm việc hoặc học bài ở phòng nào?
Đồ vật nào dùng để giữ thức ăn lạnh?
exercises.explanation: refrigerator = tủ lạnh, giữ thức ăn lạnh

exercises.question: Đồ vật nào dùng để làm mát phòng khi trời nóng?
Đồ vật nào dùng để sưởi ấm phòng khi trời lạnh?
exercises.explanation: heater = máy sưởi, dùng sưởi ấm

exerciseSets.title: Điền từ vào chỗ trống — Đồ vật trong nhà
exerciseSets.description: Chọn từ vựng phù hợp để hoàn thành câu về các món đồ trang trí và tiện ích trong nhà.

exercises.question: In winter I sleep under a warm ___ to stay cozy.
My ___ wakes me up at six o'clock every morning.
exercises.explanation: alarm clock = đồng hồ báo thức

exercises.question: I can't change the TV channel without the ___.
exercises.explanation: remote control = điều khiển từ xa

exercises.question: Someone is at the door; I just heard the ___ ring.
Please wipe your feet on the ___ before coming in.
She put fresh roses in a glass ___.
Hang your coat on the ___ by the door.
exercises.explanation: coat rack = giá treo áo khoác

exercises.question: We keep all our shoes on the ___ near the entrance.
Put your dirty clothes in the ___.
exercises.explanation: laundry basket = giỏ đựng quần áo

exercises.question: A large ___ of a mountain hangs above the sofa.
There is a ___ on the table if you need to blow your nose.
Grandpa likes to read the newspaper in his comfortable ___.
Put the coffee cups on the ___ in front of the sofa.
The books are arranged neatly in the ___.
She lit a scented ___ to make the room smell nice.

exerciseSets.title: Viết từ tiếng Anh — Đồ vật trong nhà
exerciseSets.description: Dựa vào nghĩa tiếng Việt, viết từ tiếng Anh tương ứng cho các món đồ trong nhà.

exerciseSets.title: Chọn nghĩa đúng — Đồ vật trong nhà
exerciseSets.description: Chọn đáp án đúng về nghĩa của các món đồ nội thất và tiện ích trong nhà.

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'đồng hồ báo thức'?
exercises.explanation: alarm clock = đồng hồ báo thức

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'ghế bành'?
Từ nào có nghĩa là 'điều khiển từ xa'?
exercises.explanation: remote control = điều khiển từ xa

exercises.question: Từ nào có nghĩa là 'chuông cửa'?
'coffee table' nghĩa là gì?
exercises.explanation: coffee table = bàn trà (bàn thấp trước sofa)
